message.content:
@startuml
title band301

participant BTManager as BTManager
participant BTCallback as BTCallback
participant BLEController as BLEController
participant ScannerPresenter as ScannerPresenter
participant LeScannerV21 as LeScannerV21
participant WristbandManager as WristbandManager
participant L2Layer as L2Layer
participant L2KeyPacket as L2KeyPacket
participant L2CMDPacket as L2CMDPacket
participant L1Layer as L1Layer
participant L1Packet as L1Packet
participantGattLayer as GattLayer
participant BluetoothGatt as BluetoothGatt

BTManager -- BTCallback : onCreate
BLEController -- L2Layer : new
ScannerPresenter -- LeScannerV21 : new
LeScannerV21 -- L2Layer : new
WristbandManager -- L2Layer : new

L2Layer -- L2KeyPacket : new
L2Layer -- L2CMDPacket : new
L2KeyPacket -- L1Layer : new
L2CMDPacket -- L1Layer : new

L1Layer -- L1Packet : new
L1Packet -- GattLayer : new
GattLayer -- BluetoothGatt : new

@subgraph 搜索设备
BTManager --> BTCallback : onCreate
BLEController --> L2Layer : new
ScannerPresenter --> LeScannerV21 : new
LeScannerV21 --> L2Layer : new
WristbandManager --> L2Layer : new

L2Layer --> L2KeyPacket : new
L2Layer --> L2CMDPacket : new
L2KeyPacket --> L1Layer : new
L2CMDPacket --> L1Layer : new

L1Layer --> L1Packet : new
L1Packet --> GattLayer : new
GattLayer --> BluetoothGatt : new

@subgraph 建立GATT连接
Connect --> connect : Connect : 找到合适的地址线, 使用该地址进行蓝牙连接
connect --> startTxSchedule : startTxSchedule
startTxSchedule --> startRxSchedule : startRxSchedule
startRxSchedule --> connect : Connect

onConnectionStateChange --> requestMtu : 设置MTU, 240
requestMtu --> onMtuChanged : onMtuChanged
onMtuChanged --> discoverServices : discoverServices
discoverServices --> onServicesDiscovered : onServicesDiscovered
onServicesDiscovered --> onDescriptorWrite : onDescriptorWrite

mTransportCallback --> mGattCallback : mTransportCallback.onConnectionStateChange
mGattCallback --> mHandler.handleMessage : mGattCallback.onConnectionStateChange

MSG_STATE_CONNECTED --> mHandler.handleMessage : MSG_STATE_CONNECTED
mHandler.handleMessage --> StartLoginProcess : StartLoginProcess
StartLoginProcess --> RequestLogin : RequestLogin
RequestLogin --> RequestSetNeedInfo : RequestSetNeedInfo
RequestSetNeedInfo --> SettiserProfile : SettiserProfile

@subgraph 封装并发送数据-Tx
SettingCmdUserSetting --> preparePacket : SettingCmdUserSetting
preparePacket --> preparePacket : preparePacket : key(1 B)data.len(2 B)
preparePacket --> preparePacket : preparePacket : cmd(1B),version(1B)
preparePacket --> sendData : sendData

prepareDataPacket --> preparePacket : prepareDataPacket
preparePacket --> addToFtPacketList : addToFtPacketList
addToFtPacketList --> ThreadTx.run : ThreadTx.run
ThreadTx.run --> getFromTxPacketList : getFromTxPacketList
getFromTxPacketList --> UnpackSendPacket : UnpackSendPacket
UnpackSendPacket --> sendGattLayerData : sendGattLayerData
sendGattLayerData --> sendData : sendData
sendData --> tellUpstackPacketSend : tellUpstackPacketSend
tellUpstackPacketSend --> onDataSend : onDataSend

@subgraph 接收数据-Rx
onDataSend --> receiveData : receiveData
receiveData --> decodeReceiveData : decodeReceiveData
decodeReceiveData --> parseHeader : parseHeader : 解析出magic, ack, 总长度, crc, sequenid
parseHeader --> parseData : parseData : 解析key(1B), len(2 B) :data
parseData --> parseData : parseData : 解析key(1B), len(2 B) :data

@subgraph handshake
handshake --> handshake : handshake
handshake --> handshake : handshake
handshake --> sendData : sendData
sendData --> onDataReceive : onDataReceive
onDataReceive --> onHandshakeCallback : onHandshakeCallback

@enduml
